title: elymus canadensis var. riparius
intro: Elymus canadensis var. riparius, also known as Canada wild rye, is a type of grass that is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Elymus canadensis var. riparius include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to treat a range of ailments, from skin irritations to respiratory issues.
